name: reminders
description: Set, list, and manage reminders and recurring scheduled actions

tools.name: create_reminder
tools.description: Schedule a reminder — oneshot or recurring

recurring.description: Optional: interval in seconds or natural expression (e.g. '86400' for daily, '604800' for weekly). Null for oneshot.

examples: remind me to check the deployment in 15 minutes
set a daily reminder at 9am to review email
remind me about the meeting in 2 hours

tools.name: list_reminders
tools.description: List all active reminders and scheduled actions

tools.name: cancel_reminder
tools.description: Cancel (disable) an active reminder by ID or name

identifier.description: Action ID or fuzzy name match

tools.name: delete_reminder
tools.description: Permanently delete a reminder and its run history

identifier.description: Action ID or fuzzy name match
